option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.LoginController" fx:id="rootPane" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" minWidth="900.0" minHeight="600.0" stylesheets="@../CSS/login.css" styleClass="auth-page-login">
<HBox fx:id="mainContent" alignment="CENTER" spacing="0.0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="40.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="56.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="56.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="40.0">
<!-- ── Visual / Branding Panel ── --> <VBox fx:id="visualPanel" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="auth-visual-login" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="40.0" right="38.0" bottom="40.0" left="38.0"/> </padding>
<!-- Brand badge --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <HBox styleClass="auth-brand-badge" maxWidth="180" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="✦ MEDFLOW" styleClass="auth-visual-brand"/> </HBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button fx:id="themeToggleBtn" text="Mode clair" onAction="#handleToggleTheme" styleClass="theme-toggle-auth"/> </HBox>
<Label text="Connexion" styleClass="auth-visual-title"/> <Label text="Acces securise a votre espace patient.
Vos donnees, vos rendez-vous, vos dossiers." styleClass="auth-visual-subtitle" wrapText="true"/>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<!-- Note card at bottom of visual --> <VBox spacing="6.0" styleClass="auth-visual-note"> <Label text=" Connexion rapide" styleClass="auth-visual-note-title"/> <Label text="Acces chiffre · Authentification faciale disponible · Google OAuth" styleClass="auth-visual-note-text" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- ── Form Panel ── --> <VBox fx:id="formPanel" prefWidth="500.0" spacing="14.0" styleClass="auth-form-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="44.0" right="48.0" bottom="44.0" left="48.0"/> </padding>
<Label text="Bon retour " styleClass="auth-form-title"/> <Label text="Connectez-vous a votre compte MedFlow." styleClass="auth-form-subtitle"/>
<Region minHeight="6" maxHeight="6"/>
<!-- Email --> <VBox spacing="5.0"> <Label text="ADRESSE E-MAIL" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="vous@example.com" styleClass="login-field"/> <Label fx:id="emailErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="field-error" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<!-- Password --> <VBox spacing="5.0"> <Label text="MOT DE PASSE" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" promptText="••••••••••" styleClass="login-field"/> <Label fx:id="passwordErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="field-error" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<!-- Remember + Forgot --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <CheckBox fx:id="rememberMeCheckBox" styleClass="remember-check" text="Se souvenir de moi"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Hyperlink onAction="#handleForgotPassword" styleClass="login-link" text="Mot de passe oublie ?"/> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="recaptchaContainer" spacing="4.0"> <Label text="Verification anti-bot" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="recaptcha-row"> <Button fx:id="openRecaptchaBtn" onAction="#handleOpenRecaptchaModal" styleClass="recaptcha-open-btn" text="Verifier maintenant"/> <Label fx:id="recaptchaStateLabel" styleClass="recaptcha-state recaptcha-pending" text="Non verifie"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<!-- Status --> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" managed="false" styleClass="status-message" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/>
<!-- Primary actions --> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleClear" styleClass="secondary-action" text="Effacer"/> <Button HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleLogin" styleClass="primary-action" text="Se connecter →"/> </HBox>
<!-- Google --> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleGoogleLogin" styleClass="google-action" text="G Continuer avec Google" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/>
<!-- Face login --> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleFaceLogin" styleClass="face-action" text=" Connexion Faciale" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<!-- Register link --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="register-label" text="Pas encore de compte ?"/> <Hyperlink onAction="#handleOpenRegister" styleClass="login-link-secondary" text="Creer un compte"/> </HBox> </VBox> </HBox> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.LoginController" fx:id="rootPane" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" minWidth="900.0" minHeight="600.0" stylesheets="@../CSS/login.css" styleClass="auth-page-login">
<HBox fx:id="mainContent" alignment="CENTER" spacing="0.0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="40.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="56.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="56.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="40.0">
<!-- ── Visual / Branding Panel ── --> <VBox fx:id="visualPanel" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="auth-visual-login" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="40.0" right="38.0" bottom="40.0" left="38.0"/> </padding>
<!-- Brand badge --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <HBox styleClass="auth-brand-badge" maxWidth="180" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="✦ MEDFLOW" styleClass="auth-visual-brand"/> </HBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button fx:id="themeToggleBtn" text="Mode clair" onAction="#handleToggleTheme" styleClass="theme-toggle-auth"/> </HBox>
<Label text="Connexion" styleClass="auth-visual-title"/> <Label text="Acces securise a votre espace patient.
Vos donnees, vos rendez-vous, vos dossiers." styleClass="auth-visual-subtitle" wrapText="true"/>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<!-- Note card at bottom of visual --> <VBox spacing="6.0" styleClass="auth-visual-note"> <Label text=" Connexion rapide" styleClass="auth-visual-note-title"/> <Label text="Acces chiffre · Authentification faciale disponible · Google OAuth" styleClass="auth-visual-note-text" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- ── Form Panel ── --> <VBox fx:id="formPanel" prefWidth="500.0" spacing="14.0" styleClass="auth-form-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="44.0" right="48.0" bottom="44.0" left="48.0"/> </padding>
<Label text="Bon retour " styleClass="auth-form-title"/> <Label text="Connectez-vous a votre compte MedFlow." styleClass="auth-form-subtitle"/>
<Region minHeight="6" maxHeight="6"/>
<!-- Email --> <VBox spacing="5.0"> <Label text="ADRESSE E-MAIL" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="vous@example.com" styleClass="login-field"/> <Label fx:id="emailErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="field-error" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<!-- Password --> <VBox spacing="5.0"> <Label text="MOT DE PASSE" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" promptText="••••••••••" styleClass="login-field"/> <Label fx:id="passwordErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="field-error" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<!-- Remember + Forgot --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <CheckBox fx:id="rememberMeCheckBox" styleClass="remember-check" text="Se souvenir de moi"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Hyperlink onAction="#handleForgotPassword" styleClass="login-link" text="Mot de passe oublie ?"/> </HBox>
<!-- reCAPTCHA temporairement masque (bloc conserve pour reactivation) --> <!-- <VBox fx:id="recaptchaContainer" spacing="4.0"> <Label text="Verification anti-bot" styleClass="field-label-login"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="recaptcha-row"> <Button fx:id="openRecaptchaBtn" onAction="#handleOpenRecaptchaModal" styleClass="recaptcha-open-btn" text="Verifier maintenant"/> <Label fx:id="recaptchaStateLabel" styleClass="recaptcha-state recaptcha-pending" text="Non verifie"/> </HBox> </VBox> -->
<!-- Status --> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" managed="false" styleClass="status-message" text="" visible="false" wrapText="true"/>
<!-- Primary actions --> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleClear" styleClass="secondary-action" text="Effacer"/> <Button HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleLogin" styleClass="primary-action" text="Se connecter →"/> </HBox>
<!-- Google --> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleGoogleLogin" styleClass="google-action" text="G Continuer avec Google" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/>
<!-- Face login --> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleFaceLogin" styleClass="face-action" text=" Connexion Faciale" VBox.vgrow="NEVER"/>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<!-- Register link --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="register-label" text="Pas encore de compte ?"/> <Hyperlink onAction="#handleOpenRegister" styleClass="login-link-secondary" text="Creer un compte"/> </HBox> </VBox> </HBox> </AnchorPane>
